title: AGP Interest Selector
description: A description of the records a peer is willing to disclose, or wants to receive, during a Sync session. See spec/security.md section 3.

selectorId.description: Stable identifier for this selector, exchangeable between peers instead of the full namespace/capability list; see spec/security.md section 3.

subjectNamespaces.description: Glob-style subject-id namespaces this selector covers, e.g. 'agent://bank-a/reconciliation/*'.

recordKinds.description: v1 record kinds this selector covers. Omit to cover all supported kinds.
